name: G L S Limousine Svc
recent_news: No web presence found tied to this Monterey Park PO Box / phone number; multiple unrelated 'GLS' transportation entities exist nationally but none confirmed at this address.
fit_notes: Not a tuck-in fit. Micro 4-employee limousine listing with no confirmed school-bus / SPED contracts, no website, and PO Box-only address. Below Summit minimum scale.

name: Ice Princess Limousine

fit_notes: Not a tuck-in fit. 4-employee limo with no confirmed school-bus operations. Subscale, no website, no evidence of SPED/NEMT contracts.
